title: If Your Life Is Spiraling Out Of Control, Here's The Solution To Feeling Lost
author: Dan Koe

sections.title: The Fastest Way To Ruin Your Life
sections.content: The fastest way to ruin your life.Do what others want for you. Never question what you're told.Take the route that seems safe on the surface, but is the least safe of them all.Avoid the essence of life, trial and error, and close yourself off to the profound, the deep and the meaningful.The greatest mistake is not making any mistakes at all.This is the life of the masses.They bounce around on the surface.They live the same day over and over again.They only learn what they were taught in school.Clock in, clock out.And for the rest of your day, numbing your mind from the thought of what will happen between tomorrow.The path out of meaningless living is already available to you.It is deep in your core.It is something that we all have access to, and it is called nature's compass.

sections.title: Nature's Compass
sections.content: If you don't know what you want, you will be told what you want and you will believe it.That is a very popular quote from my book, The Art of Focus,that illustrates what nature's compass is.In one short sentence if you don't know what you want, you'll be told what you want and you will believe it.And what I mean by that is that as we are growing up, as we are going to school,as we are getting a job, we are given assignments.This is what I call something that is assigned to you.You don't question and you continue doing it.And before you know it, you have so many responsibilities that you can't really do anything with your life.All of your time is taken up to the point where you don't have, the money, time or resources to create a better life for yourself.And it is so much more difficult to actually change when this happens.This is why young people are blessed, is because they don't have so many responsibilities yet.They can explore the world, they can do things. They can build for a number of hours a day the future that they want.Now, of course, we've talked about this many times before, but it's not like you're doomed.It's just that you have to set aside one hour for building your future and actually build it every single day.How to do whatever you want, do what you want,but don't ignore the consequences of your actions.You have to do what you think.You want to realize what you don't want.You have to remove what you don't want to do, what you really want.It is impossible to know with absolute certainty what the future holds.This is why the masses flocked to secure jobs and belief systems.It's an illusion of certainty to avoid struggle.You can't skip making mistakes.Mistakes are your light in the dark.Mistakes reveal problems to be solved.Problems are the limits on your mind.And as Einstein once said, you can't solve the problem with the same mind that created it.Most people skip that part. They think they want the nice car, the nice job, or to travel the world.But once they do those things, the shine, the superficial shine wears fast.So they continue convincing themselves that that's what they want are the nice things.But they never use those nice things as a portal into something deeper.They never dig deeper and let the material object, shine a light on the true problem that they're trying to solve.So they bounce around.They get the nice car.They get the cushy job.They go on fancy vacations. They get.They acquire all of these things, but they never seem to evolve or push deeper, or realize what their nature really wants,what they really want, not what their ego wants.To get what you want out of life.Pursue what you think you want, Realize what you don't want.Become aware of that problem.Sit with it, study it, dissect it, expand your mind to see beyond it.Solve the problem. To evolve one level.Repeat the process until you reach the essence of life itself. The thing here is, is that there is absolutely no set path that someone can give you, to achieve this, to get what you want to forge your own path or else.That's an assignment it was assigned to you.It wasn't created by you.Now, the thing here is, is that I see assignments as a stepping stone.So meaning I see schools and jobs as a stepping stone.I don't see them as something to avoid or something that's absolutely evil.People often think that that's what I think when it's the complete opposite case.I promote entrepreneurship and forging your own path and diving into the unknown and solving problems, and living the good life and exposing yourself to new experiences, and not getting locked in a repetitive, day to day, mindless routine that comes from schools and jobs.So those things are helpful.People can give you advice, people can give you tools, you can use them for direction, but inevitably. you're going to reach whatever that destination was and it's not going to be as nice as you wanted it to.So you have to course correct learn from your mistakes and start to pursue your own path.You have to eventually take the training wheels off.And the thing here is, is that you don't know what you want out of life, because you haven't tried anything outside of what's been assigned to you.You have experimented with new domains you haven't learned outside of high school or college.You haven't dug into a lesser explored crevice of reality that isn't taught in schools.So it's no wonder you don't know what you want with your life because you haven't expose yourself, to the thing that would expose yourself to make you realize what you want out of life.It's like, I don't know that starting a business is a possibility for me, until I start learning a skill that I have, the desire to learn to increase my value for a job.So it's not that you just start exploring and you immediately find it. You find one thing that's interesting for your current use case or your current situation,and then you find the next thing and then you expose yourself to a new potential, and then you find the clarity in education that allows you to get to that potential.You're not getting results because you don't have the skill required to get those results.You don't know what's possible because you haven't expose yourself to the perspective that makes it possible.What you want right now may be completely different tomorrow or next month or next year.Nothing lasts forever.Meaning is found in endless problem solving.Until you drill so deep, you find what you're looking for.

sections.title: The Macro Cycle Of Life – Why You Always Feel Lost
sections.content: Let's talk about why you feel lost right now, by understanding the macro cycle of life problems.Never stop.There will never be a day when problems go away.There will always be another.Don't stress. Don't react.Don't expect it to be any other way.The joy of life is to train your creative ability and swim,not drown in this beautiful black hole of problems.You feel lost because you don't know what to do next.It's obvious you don't know what to do next because you don't have a goal.You don't have a goal that you care about because you aren't aware of the problem that demands your focus.Stop worrying about setting goals until you become aware of the next problem in your life that you want to solve.A problem creates a goal.Stop focusing on the goal because if the problem isn't strong enough, or apparent enough or aware enough to add gravity to the goal, that makes you actually want to pursue it, then it's kind of useless to set the goal. and you end up like the 99% of other people that never achieve their goals.Life unfolds in chapters, phases and cycles.Your life is a story.Your year is a story. Your day is a story.Each of them have a series of goals, problems, highs and lows that may repeat themselves as time passes.And there is one macro cycle of life that I've found, through my observation and reflection on my own experience.And once you understand it, you can identify which part of the story you're in on a bigger scale.So your life or your year on a smaller scale or your day and once you're aware of the situation, and you can make sense of it from a higher perspective, then you can start to deconstruct it,figure out what the problem is and start solving it and have purpose as a result in your life.So the macro cycle that we're talking about here is composed of three phases.First, you feel lost. You don't know what to pursue next.You've solved the problem, achieved a goal and thought it was the end. Second, you become curious.You experiment with different topics, interests and ideas until you become fully aware of the problem, you want to solve.Third, you become obsessed.You dive deeper into the crevice of reality of your choice, and you can't stop learning and building, toward your goal.So there's three things to notice here. First, you feel lost.Okay, what do you do? You become curious.You have to embrace curiosity and try a bunch of different things, while being detached from the outcome of immediate results.And then once you find that thing which may take years or weeks or months, who knows?Nobody.And then you become obsessed.So you find a new goal and then you begin actualizing it.And then once you hit that goal, the cycle repeats.You feel lost because you didn't realize that that goal, was not something that you that would like sustain itself the high one sustain itself when you achieve that goal.So when you feel lost, here's just the practical steps of what we're going to do. You have to force yourself to experiment in two different directions.The first is to experiment inward, rest now, journal,walk, embrace, silence, observe and deconstruct your thoughts.Attempt to catch a signal of opportunity.Follow your thoughts to a root problem.Second is to experiment outward.Learn, read, scroll, build.Try new things.Refocus on the only things that matter in life.Health. Wealth. Relationships. Happiness.Experiment with techniques that invest energy into a goal.Any goal during the experimentation phase, you are trying to accumulate new experience, until you can see the next quest in the game.So it's like a video game when you're lost, you're at a point where the next quest is not available to you.You're like this far from hitting the next level and you can't get to the next quest until you hit that level.So you need to gain experience. You need to just try things.You need to kill a bunch of monsters and do a bunch of random side quests in order to, in our case, gain the clarity, on what to pursue fully and get into that flow state, that game provides by pursuing a quest and doing a quest.Now, the thing here avoid labeling this as shiny object syndrome.This is potentially the best thing you could do.I would argue that I had a my 2 to 3, year experimentation phase at failing at seven different business models.But that was the only thing that allowed me to gain clarity on what I'm doing now and actually pursue it full force.And you're also not just like trying things and then leaving them,you're trying, you're learning, you're getting skills, you're actually doing things, you're buying courses.Take my course If you want to write, you don't have to.I'm just like, That's one option that comes to mind is like, try to learn writing.Even if you think you're not a writer, go buy a web design course.Go buy a web development course, learn something, get the skill,because in the digital world, in the second Renaissance, I promise that those skills are going to come in handy down the road in whatever endeavor you do.And during that time as well, you're increasing your awareness surface area.This is a very important concept to understand is awareness surface area.When you have more skills, you have more education, you have exposure to different opportunities,you can identify more profitable, problems and opportunities that you can solve and go into.But now when you find your obsession, experiment, doesn't stop because it goes from lost to becoming curious.So experimentation and then becoming obsessed, which is the season of intensity or obsession.So step three is to experiment downward.The secret is to try everything until you find that one thing that you can't pull yourself away from.When you find that one thing, this is when you go deep, right?We've been experimenting inward and outward and creating span, which we're going to talk about. in the second Renaissance video, which is coming up about generalists versus specialists.Right?It's not about becoming a generalist or a specialist.It's about becoming both.It's about becoming the generalist and then diving deep and becoming a specialist, in certain areas, but having that general knowledge so you can be a more powerful specialist, and you can easily become and transfer your specialty or your specialization into different domains, because you have the general knowledge, you have the general principles that make almost everything work.So when you find that one thing, go deep and learn everything about that domain, study, everything, read every book you can, read every course, you can watch every video you can.It's going to be hard not to do this.You're going to be drawn to it, dissect all perspectives and avoid becoming dogmatic about one in nutrition.Collect truth from veganism, keto, carnivore, rape, flexible dieting, and other ideologies. until you are confident enough to create your own that is closer to truth.Truth is a process, not a commandment in business.Collect truth from eCommerce freelancing, software and other models, until you note the principles that bring clarity to your own endeavors.Self experimentation is the only way to solve your problems for good.People can diagnose and prescribe or assign a solution to your problems, but that lacks regard, for the difference in perspective, goals and experience from those prescribing the solutions.Now you've gone deep.Now we have to build up.So step four is experimentation upwards.Experimentation doesn't stop this just it's the it's it's nature's compass.It's experimentation.In this case, it's testing persistence and iteration in building, something of value with the depth, that you learn and dive into with your obsession.It's you get the value and then you distribute it so you can profit from it.Persistence and iteration. Because I'm assuming that once you've found your obsession, you want to make it a sustainable part of your life.That means you're going to have to earn a living from it.In today's world, that means building a project to help others solve their problems.Teaching in public to attract people with those problems, selling your project, so you can continue pursuing your obsession, improving your project as soon as you learn, what can only be learned through feedback and evolving to a new project.When you've reached the level that can only be reached through business.There are many ways to do this.That's why you have to experiment.But I can tell you with confidence through my own experience,that the creator economy is the most true model that you can follow while doing this,especially considering human nature, post labor, economics and the future of work.

sections.title: The Digital Renaissance
sections.content: Now you've done all of this experimentation and we're going to talk, about the second Renaissance and generalists versus specialists in a future video.But I want to talk about the digital renaissance, which I've talked about a few times before.But with all of our experimentation, we're learning so much.We need to learn how to apply that and turn it into a creative income for ourselves,become a nobody, become everything, become a designer,writer, marketer, social laser runner, bodybuilder, philosopher, scientist,psychologist and polymath who knows how to sustain their obsessive curiosity.The universe rewards those who don't impose their own limits.We are living through a second golden age, and it belongs to those who value self-education, self, experimentation, multidisciplinary study, digital leverage,skill acquisition and building their own thing.If you want to thrive, become a digital renaissance man.Here's what you do.

sections.title: Join The New Society
sections.content: The first thing is to join the new society.And when I say new society, I mean emerging society, because that's what ideas do.It's not like what they do eventually just pop up and then you have it, and it's a new idea.They evolve, they come from something like they emerge over time.The new society is already here, but it's taking time to transition in whatever way it's going to go over to it.And the old society is clearly dying and phasing out as it has been.Social media is not just an app on your phone.It is a decentralized public school marketplace and podium, but only for those who value personal responsibility.You aren't forced to be a part of this society, and that's why it's important.You no longer need startup capital to start a business.You no longer need a job board to find a career.You no longer need a publisher to launch a book.You no longer need a record label to make music.You no longer need a formal education to become an expert. You no longer need religious institutions to feed you, meaning decentralized authority over learning,meaning an earning is only a thing for those who are still asleep.All you need is an internet connection, social media account and the courage to teach, fail,improve and persist.This is what I teach into a writer or digital economics.

sections.title: Become Valuable
sections.content: So now let's talk about becoming valuable.Everyone tells you to become valuable, but nobody tells you what value is.Value is the relationship between what you do, why, you do it, how you do it, and who benefits from that equation.Value is composed of four parts.There's a problem which is a limitation or challenge that creates pain when unsolved,there's a solution, an impactful end result that allows the recipient to evolve beyond the problem.There's clarity, which is a creative system that breeds knowledge,skill and awareness to bridge the gap between problem and solution.And then there's people.The amount of people that suffer from the problem can benefit, from the solution and are ready to receive the clarity to act.Now, I want you to think about those four parts.There's problem, solution, clarity and people.That's what value is.That's what product solve or that's what products earn money for, is your solving a problem. with a solution and clarity in between and you're distributing it to people.Value is experience.Exchange value is the impact of your story, because it's the same thing as the story problem solution.What's the path in between the highs and lows and how are you going to navigate that?That's called clarity.Then other people resonating with that story.So to make a creative income, our job is to gain experience by solving the problems, that prevent or evolution and pass down the condensed wisdom to those who are ready to receive it.So here are the steps to becoming valuable.Now that we understand what value is.

sections.title: Unveil Problems With An Anti-Vision
sections.content: Step one is to unveil problems with an anti vision.It's easier to know what you don't want from experience than it is to know what you want from imagination.So create an anti vision for your future.Keep a running note that you will add to as you observe life.What do you not want to look like?How do you not want to feel?What does your worst day look like?What qualities do you not want in your friends, customers, partner, and coworkers?How much money isn't enough to survive?How does everything above spread into each area of your life and prevent you from doing what you want?Hit on the things that matter.Health, wealth, relationships and happiness.Those are the eternal markets in business.If you build a creative solution for a problem within those domains, you won't have a problem making a living.From your experience, this is what everyone's doing.Go and look online.What am I saying?I'm selling in the wealth domain. I'm selling career opportunity with writing because I've solved that problem in my life, and now I'm selling the solution.

sections.title: Identify Solutions With A Vision
sections.content: Step number two is to identify solutions with a vision.Because now when you create your anti vision, you have a plethora of problems that you can solve.Pick one, solve it, move on to the next.Meaning is found not in the achievement of a goal, but in solving, the endless string of problems that pull you deeper into the nature of reality.Now, to increase your desire to solve the problem, create a vision.Write out the opposite of what your anti vision was,and you want to treat this as a minimum viable vision to start,meaning that you don't have to worry about it being perfect or complete.You can add to it over time because you're not going to think of everything you want.Now you have to experience life to be able to have the idea of what you want in the future.So before we go further, do you see what we're doing here?We identified problems with an anti vision.We created solutions with a vision.When we actually solved the problems, and moved towards the vision, we're improving ourselves. We've created a marketing strategy of transformation and we've created a product, which is the system that you used to reach, those goals through education, skill, acquisition and action.So you're killing three birds with one stone.This is self-improvement, other improvement.

sections.title: Learn & Build For Clarity
sections.content: Now step three is to learn and build for clarity.Because we have problem solution.Now we need clarity and then we need people to round out the value equation.Don't learn to build, build to learn.You've chosen a problem that you want to solve in your life.This could be related to fitness, finances, freedom, or anything else that is preventing you, from living the life you want.With that problem in mind, laser in on one big goal.But remember, goals don't start out magnetic.You probably don't care about the goal.You must invest energy into the goal until you feel as if you are wasting resources for not achieving it.Your goal must frame your perspective for enough time to register reasons to continue pursuing it.You don't develop an intrinsic philosophy in one day.You develop it through conversations, reading, listening and filtering reality.Until you stack enough wise to hold you accountable, you will fail.And that is the only way to realize what you need to do next.

sections.title: Attract People With Your Story
sections.content: Now step four is to attract people with your story.Be a failure once the project to a crowd of crickets publish your thoughts and get called the fool.Start the venture and watch people criticize your first moves.Everyone else did it. You aren't a special case.Invest in your portfolio of failures until you can afford to succeed.Your portfolio of failures is your story.And like a movie, people are interested more in the lows than they are the highs.The lows. Set up the scene for the highs, right?People are interested in the negativity and the drama, but you can present that, in a way that allows them to actually change and improve and receive something of value from it.You attract people and profit to you when you have the solution to a problem in your life.

sections.title: Distribute Your Value
sections.content: Now the final step is to distribute your value because that's how you earn a creative income,doing what you want based on the interests, skills and everything else that you experimented with to learn.I'm not interested in giving you this step, by step business model because that's not what the creator economy is.It's the one that you create.It's the one that you discover.It's based on your interests and your skills.In multidisciplinary study, your success is dependent on being a polymath and Renaissance man.The greatest skill is writing because it forces you to articulate your value.It is the foundation of all media.It can be repurposed into any other medium, and any other skill you acquire enhances it.It brings immense mental clarity.Learn to write it.Take some time to realize that writing is the highest leverage work.You must synthesize your value into impactful ideas that live in the heads of others.Rent free and influence their thoughts and behaviors. You do this by writing emails, content guides and products with persistent and iterative effort.Writing is the foundation of communication.Communicate action is how you distribute value.Distributing value is how you attract people.If you don't attract people, you will never have someone else in the value exchange process.This isn't a job where someone hands you a paycheck for completing mechanical tasks that will be replaced.This is a purpose that must be shared by another in order to earn a creative income.I've discussed all of this in previous videos, like the one person business playlist on my YouTube channel.Aside from that, if you want to become a synthesizer or a value creator, or start your digital career, consider joining Cortex University.It is our university level education for synthesizers, creators, marketers,anyone that wants to build and sell things on the Internet, as a meaningful way of life, not just a shallow job.So thank you for watching. Like subscribe. Check things out to focus my book first thing in the description.If you want the deeper philosophy to all of this.Aside from that, enjoy the rest of your day.Thanks for watching again. Bye. --- 由 vCaptions 生成 ---
